subcodes.first_line: O thou whose senses are perfumed with the fragrances of holiness! I address thee from this blessed spot [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا من تعطر مشامه من نفحات القدس انی اخاطبک من هذه البقعه المبارکه منشا
subcodes.subjects: @call to action, @exhortations and counsels, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @praise and encouragement
